substrates.substrate_A: benzoylformic acid ester 1 with chiral menthyl auxiliary

chemistry.bond_formed: C-C and C-O bonds forming oxetane ring
chemistry.scope_summary: Single substrate pair studied - benzoylformic acid ester with chiral menthyl auxiliary and 2,3-dimethyl-2-butene, giving diastereomeric oxetane products with moderate diastereoselectivity (49-52% d.e.)

optimization_table.key_findings: Slug flow with H2O gave better yields than batch system, with 100% conversion achieved in only 30 seconds

figures.caption: Scheme 1.  The employed Paternò – Büchi reaction

figures.flow_path: multiple inlet streams converge through mixer into reactor with collection at outlet
figures.key_information: Two-part schematic showing flow reactor setup with mixing junction and coiled reactor section leading to collection vessel
figures.caption: Figure 1.  Flow-modes in the FEP microcapillary reactor
Figure 2.  Light transmission of  1  in toluene at 365 nm | Figure 3.  Effects on photoirradiation of the slug flow modes

translation_logic.batch_limitation: Long reaction time (180 min), low yield (40%), limited light penetration in thick reaction vessel
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Dramatic time reduction (0.25 min vs 180 min), improved light dispersion and stirring in slug flow, thin film effects enhance mass transfer
translation_logic.what_changed: Reaction time reduced from 180 to 0.25 minutes, atmosphere changed from N2 to H2O slug flow, vessel changed from Pyrex tube to FEP microcapillary
translation_logic.what_stayed_same: Temperature (10°C), concentration (0.05 M), solvent (toluene), light source power (500 W Hg lamp)
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Reduced reaction volume and continuous processing

figure_descriptions: Flow reactor setup with T-junction mixer and coiled reactor
Light transmission and slug flow effects analysis

notes: Well-documented comparison between batch and flow conditions. Key claim of 30 second complete conversion vs 420 second batch reaction time from key_claim differs from extracted 180 min batch time - using extracted value as more specific. Throughput calculated from scale and residence time.
